creator: brampton@gmail.com
text:
The tool misc/cpuid does not list the features on newer Intel CPUs.

Fix: I have used the latest Intel spec sheet and added many of the missing features. I have also corrected some of the old ones which appeared to have been originally typed wrong.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run cpuid on a new Intel machine and it will report many of the features as unknown.
